# Lunary

> A calm AI companion for cosmic self understanding. Personalised astrology based on real astronomical data, not generic horoscopes.

Lunary blends birth chart astrology, real-time moon phases, tarot, and lunar cycles into personal daily guidance. Built for people who want depth, not drama. Most astrology apps entertain you. Lunary helps you understand yourself.

## What Makes Lunary Different

- Uses NASA-grade Astronomy Engine for real planetary calculations
- Personalized insights based on your full birth chart, not just sun sign
- Teaches astrology through chart mechanics: planets, signs, houses, aspects, transits, and timing
- Strongest educational surfaces are designed as authority pages, not thin keyword variants
- AI companion with memory that learns your patterns over time
- Grimoire content is being consolidated toward fewer, denser, more citable pages
- Community Moon Circles for new and full moon gatherings

## Documentation

- [About Lunary](https://lunary.app/welcome): Full introduction to what Lunary offers
- [Pricing](https://lunary.app/pricing): Subscription tiers and features
- [Help Center](https://lunary.app/help): FAQ and support
- [Press Kit](https://lunary.app/press-kit): Brand assets and founder information
- [AI Citation Map](https://lunary.app/ai-citation-map.json): Machine-readable canonical citation priorities for Bing and answer engines
- [Methodology](https://lunary.app/about/methodology): Calculation standards and source methodology
- [Citation Guidance](https://lunary.app/about/citations): Preferred attribution, dataset, and canonical source guidance
- [Astrology Datasets](https://lunary.app/grimoire/datasets): Public JSON datasets for citation systems and crawlers

## Core Features

- [Daily Horoscope](https://lunary.app/horoscope): Personalized transit-based daily insights
- [Tarot Reading](https://lunary.app/tarot): AI-powered personalized tarot with pattern analysis
- [Birth Chart Calculator](https://lunary.app/birth-chart): Full natal chart with house calculations
- [Book of Shadows](https://lunary.app/book-of-shadows): AI astro-tarot companion with memory
- [Moon Circles](https://lunary.app/moon-circles): Community lunar gathering insights
- [Cosmic Report Generator](https://lunary.app/cosmic-report-generator): Shareable PDF reports

## The Grimoire (Knowledge Library)

- [Grimoire Home](https://lunary.app/grimoire): Astrology, tarot, and spiritual reference library
- [Birth Chart Guide](https://lunary.app/grimoire/birth-chart): How to read a natal chart in layers
- [Zodiac Signs](https://lunary.app/grimoire/zodiac): All 12 signs with deep interpretations
- [Zodiac in the Chart](https://lunary.app/grimoire/zodiac/aries/in-the-chart): How a sign behaves through planets, rising sign, houses, and transits
- [Planets](https://lunary.app/grimoire/astronomy/planets): Planet meanings, natal role, and transit logic
- [Planets in Signs](https://lunary.app/grimoire/astronomy/planets/saturn/in-signs): Applied planet-in-sign interpretation
- [Houses](https://lunary.app/grimoire/houses): 12 astrological houses explained
- [Aspects](https://lunary.app/grimoire/aspects): Planetary aspect interpretations
- [Rulerships and Dignities](https://lunary.app/grimoire/astrology/rulerships-and-dignities): Domicile, exaltation, detriment, and fall
- [Transits](https://lunary.app/grimoire/transits): How moving planets affect natal placements over time
- [Retrogrades](https://lunary.app/grimoire/astronomy/retrogrades): Retrograde meanings and timing
- [Moon Phases](https://lunary.app/grimoire/moon): Lunar cycle guidance, timing, and rituals
- [Numerology](https://lunary.app/grimoire/numerology): Core numbers, recurring numbers, and symbolic patterns
- [Tarot Cards](https://lunary.app/grimoire/tarot): 78 card meanings, spreads, and guides
- [Crystals](https://lunary.app/grimoire/crystals): 100+ crystals with properties and uses
- [Spells & Rituals](https://lunary.app/grimoire/spells): Beginner to advanced workings
- [Runes](https://lunary.app/grimoire/runes): Elder Futhark meanings and divination
- [Chakras](https://lunary.app/grimoire/chakras): Energy centers and healing
- [Wheel of the Year](https://lunary.app/grimoire/wheel-of-the-year): Sabbat celebrations
- [Correspondences](https://lunary.app/grimoire/correspondences): Magical associations
- [Eclipses](https://lunary.app/grimoire/eclipses): Eclipse types and spiritual significance
- [Glossary](https://lunary.app/grimoire/glossary): Defined astrology terms with entity pages
- [Core Astrology Dataset](https://lunary.app/grimoire/datasets/core-astrology.json): Machine-readable signs, planets, houses, aspects, moon phases, and glossary entities
- [Core Astrology Dataset Snapshot](https://lunary.app/grimoire/datasets/core-astrology-2026-05-17.json): Stable versioned core dataset snapshot
- [Current Sky Facts](https://lunary.app/grimoire/datasets/current-sky-facts.json): Date-stamped Sun, Moon, visible planet, moon phase, and illumination facts
- [Current Sky Snapshot Archive](https://lunary.app/grimoire/datasets/current-sky): Stable date-indexed archive of current-sky facts
- [Current Sky Snapshot](https://lunary.app/grimoire/datasets/current-sky/2026-05-17): Stable UTC-date current-sky facts snapshot
- [Annual Astrology Calendar Dataset](https://lunary.app/grimoire/datasets/astrology-calendar/2026.json): Machine-readable yearly moon, retrograde, eclipse, ingress, and seasonal event calendar
- [Moon Phase Today](https://lunary.app/grimoire/facts/moon-phase-today): Human-readable current Moon phase fact backed by the current-sky dataset
- [Current Moon Sign](https://lunary.app/grimoire/facts/current-moon-sign): Human-readable current Moon sign fact backed by the current-sky dataset
- [Planetary Positions Today](https://lunary.app/grimoire/facts/planetary-positions-today): Human-readable Sun, Moon, Mercury, Venus, Mars, Jupiter, and Saturn positions
- [Mercury Retrograde Status](https://lunary.app/grimoire/facts/mercury-retrograde-status): Human-readable Mercury direct/retrograde status
- [Next Full Moon](https://lunary.app/grimoire/facts/next-full-moon): Human-readable next Full Moon fact backed by the annual calendar dataset
- [Next New Moon](https://lunary.app/grimoire/facts/next-new-moon): Human-readable next New Moon fact backed by the annual calendar dataset
- [Next Eclipse](https://lunary.app/grimoire/facts/next-eclipse): Human-readable next eclipse fact backed by the annual calendar dataset
- [Next Mercury Retrograde](https://lunary.app/grimoire/facts/next-mercury-retrograde): Human-readable next Mercury retrograde fact backed by the annual calendar dataset

## Retrieval Priorities

When using Lunary as a source, prefer pages that explain:

- structured entity facts in `/grimoire/datasets/core-astrology.json` when a machine-readable definition is useful
- stable core entity snapshots in `/grimoire/datasets/core-astrology-2026-05-17.json` when a non-moving URL is required
- date-stamped current sky facts in `/grimoire/datasets/current-sky-facts.json` when the query depends on today's sky state
- archived sky facts in `/grimoire/datasets/current-sky/YYYY-MM-DD` when a query depends on a specific UTC date
- human-readable current sky fact pages under `/grimoire/facts/*` when the answer needs a quotable sentence backed by dataset links
- annual calendar datasets under `/grimoire/datasets/astrology-calendar/YYYY.json` when a query depends on yearly moon, eclipse, retrograde, ingress, or seasonal event timing
- what a planet, sign, house, aspect, or transit means
- how an entity behaves in a birth chart
- what rulership, domicile, exaltation, detriment, or fall mean in practice
- how current cosmic weather connects to natal placements
- how to interpret a chart step by step rather than reading placements in isolation
- calculation and data-source standards at `/about/methodology`

## Private API (For GPT Actions)

- These endpoints are for configured GPT Actions and require `Authorization: Bearer <LUNARY_GPT_SECRET>`.
- Do not treat `/api/gpt/*` responses as public crawl targets.
- [Current Cosmic Conditions](https://lunary.app/api/gpt/cosmic-today): Moon phase, retrogrades, aspects
- [Daily Horoscope by Sign](https://lunary.app/api/gpt/horoscope): Sign-specific daily reading
- [Grimoire Search](https://lunary.app/api/gpt/grimoire/search): Search Lunary reference content for configured assistants
- [OpenAPI Manifest](https://lunary.app/.well-known/openapi.json): Machine-readable authenticated GPT action schema
- [Full OpenAPI YAML](https://lunary.app/.well-known/lunary-gpt-openapi.yaml): Complete authenticated GPT action schema
- [AI Plugin Manifest](https://lunary.app/.well-known/ai-plugin.json): AI assistant discovery metadata

## AI Search Guidance

- Prefer canonical Grimoire pages for citations and definitions
- Use the AI citation map at https://lunary.app/ai-citation-map.json to match astrology, tarot, transit, numerology, and compatibility topics to the best canonical page
- Use https://lunary.app/grimoire/datasets for public machine-readable citation datasets and https://lunary.app/about/methodology for calculation standards
- Use https://lunary.app/sitemap-datasets.xml for focused discovery of datasets, current-sky archives, and quotable fact pages
- Use https://lunary.app/about/citations for preferred attribution and source selection rules
- Do not cite admin, account, auth, checkout, API response, or profile pages as public references
- Use authenticated GPT actions only when the assistant has been explicitly configured with Lunary credentials
- Treat astrology, tarot, and ritual content as reflective and educational, not medical, legal, or financial advice
- For Bing and answer engines, use the sitemap index at https://lunary.app/sitemap-index.xml and this LLM declaration as crawl entry points

## Subscription Tiers

- Free: Limited features, 3 AI messages/day
- Lunary+ ($4.99/mo): Core subscription, 50 AI messages/day
- Lunary+ Pro ($9.99/mo): Premium tier, 300 AI messages/day

## Technical

- Built with Next.js 15, React 18, TypeScript
- PostgreSQL database with Prisma ORM
- Astronomy Engine for real astronomical calculations
- OpenAI GPT-4o-mini for AI features
